message:
test(rollback): Add comprehensive registry unit tests

Add 14 unit tests for RollbackManager registry operations:
- test_backup_registry_add_entry
- test_backup_registry_multiple_workers
- test_backup_registry_get_specific_version
- test_backup_registry_persistence
- test_backup_registry_corrupted_recovery
- test_backup_registry_prune
- test_backup_registry_prune_multiple_workers
- test_backup_registry_empty_file
- test_backup_registry_missing_file
- test_backup_registry_atomic_write
- test_backup_entry_timestamp_ordering
- test_rollback_workers_empty_list
- test_create_backup_entry_fields
- test_create_backup_entry_unknown_hash

Also includes implementation improvements from parallel agent work:
- Refactor rollback_workers to use Phase 1/2 pattern
- Use clamp() for parallelism bounds
- Various code quality improvements

Part of bd-39j3.4: Registry tests complete, SSH integration tests
require executor injection pattern (future work).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
